name: io.github.nhilbert/merkraum
title: Merkraum
description: Auditable knowledge memory for AI agents with belief tracking, contradiction detection, and full audit trail. Structured knowledge graph (Neo4j) + semantic search with provenance, confidence scoring, and human-auditable epistemics.

environmentVariables.name: MERKRAUM_CLIENT_ID
environmentVariables.description: OAuth client ID for PKCE flow
